since_last: 54% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.16%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 54% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.84% · BTC -0.61% · Gold -1.60% · Nasdaq100 +1.73%. 54% of 85 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.16%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.16%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -1.77%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INOD is the standout at -8.65%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +7.94%, MRVL +7.67%, AMAT +7.60%, ARM +7.21%, KLAC +7.06%. Laggards: INOD -8.65%, IBM -7.06%, SPCX -5.05%, MDB -4.89%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -5.05% at $182.13
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -5.05% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
